_meta.purpose: UPDATES to existing keys in en.json. Replace these values.
_meta.rationale: Shift messaging from technology/feature-centric to outcome/revenue-centric per Vivify Health patterns

hero.headline: Reduce Readmissions. Increase Revenue. Simplify Care Management.
hero.subtext: RPM, CCM, APCM, AWV, and Value-Based Care on one platform. 120+ device integrations. Multilingual support in English, Korean, and Spanish. Trusted by 40+ US hospitals.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Care Management, From Prevention to Performance
solutions.description: From Remote Patient Monitoring to Value-Based Care -- a single platform with RPM, CCM, APCM, AWV, HRA, and VBC solutions serving 40+ US hospitals and 3,000+ enrolled patients.
solutions.rpm_desc: 120+ devices, 3 languages, automated billing -- reduce readmissions while generating Medicare revenue
solutions.ccm_desc: Multilingual care coordination with automated time tracking -- the only CCM platform serving diverse communities
solutions.awv_desc: Digital multilingual HRA and automated component tracking -- turn wellness visits into care management revenue
solutions.vbc_desc: Dual revenue strategy -- earn FFS reimbursement today while building quality scores for VBC incentives

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
cta.subtext: From remote monitoring to value-based care performance, HicareNet supports every step. See how 40+ US hospitals use our platform to improve outcomes and grow revenue.

hero.headline: Care Management Solutions That Pay for Themselves
hero.subtext: RPM, CCM, APCM, AWV, HRA, and Value-Based Care on a single multilingual platform. Proven across 40+ US hospitals with 120+ device integrations.

rpm.title: Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM)
rpm.description: Remote Patient Monitoring helps you catch clinical changes before they become emergencies. With 120+ device integrations, multilingual patient engagement, and automated billing support, HicareNet's RPM turns continuous monitoring into better outcomes and new revenue.
rpm.feature1: 120+ FDA-approved medical devices -- no proprietary kits, no vendor lock-in
rpm.feature2: Multilingual patient app in English, Korean, and Spanish (no competitor offers this)
rpm.feature3: Automated alerts, clinical thresholds, and 16-day compliance tracking
rpm.feature4: Start billing from day one -- automated CPT code mapping and time documentation
rpm.outcome1: Reduce heart failure readmissions by up to 38% (Lancet 2018)
rpm.outcome2: Generate $100-147 per patient per month in Medicare RPM revenue
rpm.outcome3: Serve diverse patient populations with trilingual app support (EN/KR/ES)

ccm.title: Chronic Care Management (CCM)
ccm.description: Chronic Care Management coordinates non-face-to-face care for Medicare patients with two or more chronic conditions. HicareNet's CCM platform automates the most burdensome part -- time tracking -- while enabling care teams to engage patients in their preferred language.
ccm.feature1: Multilingual care coordination (EN/KR/ES) -- the only platform that does this
ccm.feature2: AI-powered time tracking automation reduces CCM's biggest administrative burden
ccm.feature3: APCM transition-ready -- evaluate CCM vs APCM for each patient on a single platform
ccm.feature4: RPM + CCM simultaneous billing for combined revenue on eligible patients
ccm.outcome1: Serve Korean, Hispanic, and English-speaking patients with native-language care
ccm.outcome2: Earn $64-194 per patient per month in Medicare CCM reimbursement
ccm.outcome3: Reduce administrative burden with automated time capture and threshold alerts

awv.title: Annual Wellness Visits & HRA
awv.description: Medicare Annual Wellness Visits provide direct reimbursement of $118-175 per visit -- but their real value lies in discovering patients who qualify for RPM, CCM, and APCM. HicareNet streamlines all 8 required AWV components with digital pre-visit HRA and automated checklist tracking.
awv.feature1: Digital pre-visit HRA -- patients complete assessments via mobile app before their visit
awv.feature2: All 8 required AWV components tracked with automated checklist
awv.feature4: Multilingual AWV support -- HRA, prevention plans, and screening in EN/KR/ES
awv.outcome1: Increase AWV completion rates with pre-visit digital HRA distribution
awv.outcome2: Unlock $2,500+ in annual per-patient revenue through downstream enrollment
awv.outcome3: Capture preventive care revenue with G0438/G0439/G0402 billing

vbc.title: Value-Based Care
vbc.description: Value-Based Care is not a separate service -- it is the outcome of everything your practice does with RPM, CCM, APCM, and AWV data. HicareNet connects the dots: every blood pressure reading, every care plan update, and every wellness visit feeds directly into your quality scores and financial performance.
vbc.feature1: Dual revenue strategy: FFS billing today + VBC incentives tomorrow
vbc.feature2: Automatic quality measure mapping across HEDIS, Stars, MIPS, and eCQM
vbc.feature3: Real-time quality dashboards for MIPS scores, HEDIS gaps, and Stars performance
vbc.feature4: Multilingual care drives health equity and CAHPS patient experience improvement
vbc.outcome1: Improve quality scores across HEDIS, Stars, and MIPS measures
vbc.outcome2: Maximize shared savings and incentive payments in ACO/MSSP programs
vbc.outcome3: Support small practice VBC readiness with integrated population health tools

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtext: See how HicareNet's care management platform can improve outcomes and increase revenue for your practice.
